name: aurora-ai-ai-image-grid
title: Aurora AI AiImageGrid
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora AI AiImageGrid — Claude Design parity.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora AI AiImageGrid.

Install `aurora-tokens` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/ai-image-grid.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`.
